subject: Findings from 35,000 posts over 3 years in 45min
body:
I made a youtube video. It covers 6 content strategies I'm doubling down on after reviewing 35,000 pieces of content over the past 40 months.

If you're a business owner who sells stuff, I think watching it will make you more money than just about anything else.

Also - I'm only making business content for business owner for the foreseeable future. No more wide audience stuff. No more wizbangs ADD production. Just tactical business stuff. I prefer it. You prefer it. We all prefer it.

Also also - I'm gonna start sending emails.

Talk soon,

Alex Hormozi
